---
title: "Ethical Frameworks Through a Game-Theoretic Lens"
short-title: "Ethics Frameworks"
author: "Raban Heller"
date-modified: today
abstract: "Consequentialism, deontology, and contractualism viewed through strategic interaction."
keywords: ["ethics", "consequentialism", "deontology", "contractualism", "game theory"]
---

# Ethics Frameworks {#sec-ethics-frameworks}

::: {.callout-note}
This chapter is under development.
:::
